lines.content: # AI Usage Record for AlterEgo Project
- Deepseek (supports very long prompt and thread without crashing/slowing down, mainly for creating tedious code
(e.g. manipulating strings, repeating taskList logic into contactList), debugging, and creating testcases)
- ChatGPT (for occasional use when deepseek fails to find a bug)
- Google search Gemini (for java syntax and imports)
- Explain packages, gradle, JUnit, and jar
- Remark: Shortening reading time and making tedious work easier
- Help with supplementary understanding to the javafx tutorial
- Adding additional assertion that I missed
- Assistance in adding contacts feature (tedious code with similar logic to task operation,
tedious string generation, fixing bugs that arise from the addition of contact)
- Generating testcases for personal use (ensuring the new feature isn't buggy)
- Total time saved estimate: probably 6 hours worth of testcases
- Remark: Saves a lot of time in adding contacts and tedious debugging
This is a project template for a greenfield Java project. It's named after the Java mascot _Duke_. Given below are instructions on how to use it.
Prerequisites: JDK 17, update Intellij to the most recent version.
1. Open Intellij (if you are not in the welcome screen, click `File` > `Close Project` to close the existing project first)
1. Open the project into Intellij as follows:
1. Select the project directory, and click `OK`.
1. If there are any further prompts, accept the defaults.
1. Configure the project to use **JDK 17** (not other versions) as explained in [here](https://www.jetbrains.com/help/idea/sdk.html#set-up-jdk).
In the same dialog, set the **Project language level** field to the `SDK default` option.

1. After that, locate the `src/main/java/alterego.AlterEgo.java` file, right-click it, and choose `Run alterego.AlterEgo.main()` (if the code editor is showing compile errors, try restarting the IDE). If the setup is correct, you should see something like the below as the output:

**Warning:** Keep the `src\main\java` folder as the root folder for Java files (i.e., don't rename those folders or move Java files to another folder outside of this folder path), as this is the default location some tools (e.g., Gradle) expect to find Java files.

AlterEgo is a **desktop chatbot app** for managing tasks and contacts, optimized for use via a **Command Line Interface (CLI)** while having the benefits of a **Graphical User Interface (GUI)**.
- ⚠️ Note: Overlapping events will trigger a warning
- Keyword can be any part of the task label, including date
